_comment: Environment texture manifest for the DEV GUY office FPS (retro DOOM-style techbase). 'present:false' entries are planned variants not yet generated - the loader should skip any entry whose file is missing or present=false. Drop the PNG at the listed path and flip present to true.

conventions.wall: tile horizontal only; texture height = full wall height (wrapU=REPEAT, wrapV=CLAMP). Typical size 512x256.
conventions.ceiling_floor: tile both axes (wrapU=REPEAT, wrapV=REPEAT). Typical size 512x512.
conventions.glass: has_alpha:true. Render in transparent pass: alpha ON, depth-TEST ON, depth-WRITE OFF, sorted back-to-front, so enemies/objects behind stay visible.
conventions.emissive: if emissive:true, draw full-bright (not dimmed by level lighting) and optionally add bloom; the lit area is baked into the texture.
conventions.non_tiling: tile:'none' = unique segment, place once, do not repeat.

textures.theme: riveted metal panels + hazard trim band with outlets/ethernet, cable runs.
white acoustic tiles, T-bar grid, vent grille + fluorescent light panel.
grey-blue office carpet tiles, fabric weave, worn tracks.
blue-tinted glass partition in riveted metal frame.

textures.alpha_notes: frame opaque (255), clear pane ~30% opaque (~75) = ~70% see-through, lets light through.
textures.theme: clear near-colorless interior glass window in metal frame.
server/computer rack wall: equipment modules, blinking red/green/amber LEDs, circuit-board green, vents, cables.
textures.edge_match: left/right edges = riveted metal frame post; sits flush between wall_techbase sections.

textures.theme: server/network rack wall variant: stacked switches, patch panels with colored cables, drive bays, vents, PCBs; denser cabling than wall_servers.
textures.edge_match: left/right edges = riveted metal frame post; tiles horizontally and sits flush between wall_techbase sections.

textures.theme: recessed monitor/dashboard: green-on-black terminal, fake charts, scanlines, metal frame.
textures.place_notes: center screen is unique; only side panels repeat - place sparingly.

textures.theme: cubicle partition: grey-blue fabric acoustic panel, brushed-aluminium posts on edges + rails, cable raceway.
burnout zone: worn metal panels, cracks, peeling paint, rust, soot/burn marks, exposed wires, grime.
closed sci-fi office door / airlock with center seam, hazard stripes, control panel + red light.
textures.place_notes: unique non-tiling segment; left/right edges match tiling walls so it sits between them. Door could be animated/openable later.

textures.theme: locked sci-fi door, BLUE keycard indicator.
locked sci-fi door, YELLOW keycard indicator.
locked sci-fi door, RED keycard indicator.
structural pillar/column: central riveted beam with beveled edges, bolts top-to-bottom, hazard band at base, recessed wall flanks.
acoustic ceiling with a broken fluorescent panel: cracked diffuser, one tube dark, one harsh flickering blue glow, scorch marks, dangling wire.
textures.emissive_notes: the working tube glows; consider a flicker animation on the emissive contribution.

textures.theme: exposed industrial ceiling: HVAC ducts, pipes, cable trays, conduits on a dark deck, brackets, rust.
decayed suspended ceiling: water-stained sagging tiles, cracked/missing tiles showing structure above, mold, grime.
raw concrete slab: form-board imprints, expansion-joint grid, cracks, water stains, rusty rebar spots.
